doctors.name: Dr. Kalpa Pandya
doctors.bio: Dr. Kalpa Pandya leads Shreshtha Dentistry with a focus on surgical precision and ethical, evidence-based care. With advanced training in Head & Neck Surgery, she brings hospital-grade expertise to every procedure — from complex extractions to full-mouth rehabilitation.

doctors.name: Dr. Swetha R K
doctors.bio: Dr. Swetha is an award-winning dental professional known for her patient-centred approach and academic rigour. With a Fellowship in Medical Cosmetology from Greifswald, Germany, multiple Best Paper awards, and the Young Dental Achiever Award (2023), she combines clinical skill with research-driven precision.
highlights: MDS — TN Dr. MGR Medical University
Fellowship in Medical Cosmetology, Greifswald, Germany
